title: 日本ダービーの後に・完走、完勝！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? That cheering...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: She did it! Tickezo won! Amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Sniff... That was the best race ever, Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: TIC-KE-ZO! TIC-KE-ZO!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: My name... They're shouting my name!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I won? I actually won?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: TIC-KE-ZO! TIC-KE-ZO!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa... WHOOOA!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaagh! I DID IT! I DID IT! YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I... I WOOOON!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on winning the Japanese Derby!
The battle between BNW was so amazing I
couldn't take my eyes off it for a second!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Seeing things from the other side of the finish line
was awesome! Everyone in the audience looked
so excited!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The cheers made me feel all squishy inside—it
really is like a dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've always wanted to win the Derby, so I'm really
happy I could make this a race that can inspire
others to dream too!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Will you be taking on the Kikuka Sho next?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I only just finished the Derby, so I haven't
really thought about what I'll do next yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's the Kikuka Sho or any other race, I'll
make sure to make it amazing!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Fantastic! One last word for the fans?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! Um... uh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket smiles widely at the camera.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm Winning Ticket, the Umamusume who won the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TRAAINNEEEEER!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank youuuuu! I... I won... the Derbyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear it? All those cheers? They called my
name!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It was just like the Derby I watched when I was a
kid! No, it was even more exciting!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I finally ran a race that could inspire people!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her long-standing dream of winning the Derby
came true in the best possible way.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! You think so too, Trainer? I'm so... so
tooouched!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Of course you're crying.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Let me warn you—I'll get really mad if you show
me pity.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You were really strong today. I know you raced
your best.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But it's not over yet. For me, it's just the
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You ran really great too! It totally got me
charged up to run even faster!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So... let's run together again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Of course. And next time I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've long dreamed of the Japanese Derby too.
And I don't think my performance today was
flawed.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I lost... because you were simply better. Even so, I
won't let the same happen next time. I promise
you that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uwaaaagh! It's all thanks to you guys though!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin and Hayahide—THANK YOOOUUUU!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Winning Ticket's emotional cries and the
spectators' excited cheering continue for quite a
while.
